case_title: JULIA MASON WOOD VS. THEFINESTWATCHES.COM INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
DECLARATION OF ROGER KUO IN OPPOSITION TO APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT THEFINESTWATCHES.COM INC. KUO, ROGER
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-18-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JULIA WOOD'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT THEFINESTWATCHES.COM AND DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROGER KUO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy Wilson, Esq. of Folger Levin LLP, Tel. 415.625.1058, appearing for plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JULIA WOOD's APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is Granted as to Defendant TheFinestWatches.com and denied without prejudice as to Defendant Roger Kuo. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
